name: port-sudan-national-university-student-registration-receipts-archive
description: Student Registration Receipts Archive System for Port Sudan National University

scripts.start: concurrently "cd server && npm start" "cd client && npm start"
scripts.dev: concurrently "cd server && npm run dev" "cd client && npm run dev"
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install
